fallback_placeholder.note: Used automatically if no local Stable Diffusion server is reachable, so the pipeline still runs end-to-end for free.

cinematic_neon.base_prompt: cinematic digital illustration, neon lighting, dramatic atmosphere, ultra detailed, vertical composition, 9:16
cinematic_neon.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, watermark, text, logo, deformed, extra limbs

dark_high_contrast.base_prompt: dramatic black and white illustration with sharp red accent, high contrast, vertical composition, 9:16
dark_high_contrast.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, watermark, text, logo, washed out colors

soft_gradient.base_prompt: soft pastel gradient illustration, dreamy atmosphere, gentle lighting, vertical composition, 9:16
soft_gradient.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, watermark, text, logo, harsh contrast

gold_luxury.base_prompt: luxurious illustration with gold and black tones, elegant composition, vertical, 9:16
gold_luxury.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, watermark, text, logo, cluttered
